description_for_human: Create real playable games by describing them to AI. The Raku Runtime executes .raku game definition files instantly.
description_for_model: RakuAI is an AI-native game engine. You generate .raku files (JSON) that the runtime executes instantly. Use the schema at https://rakuai.com/schema.json to validate structure. The Standard Format uses declarative JSON with sections: game (title, genre, template), ai (DDA, NPC personality, emotional tracking), entities (players, NPCs, enemies with behaviors), scenes (levels with themes and properties), rendering (resolution, FPS, post-processing), audio (spatial audio, adaptive music), xr (OpenXR support), and ai_disclosure (required for platform compliance). Available genres: shooter, platformer, puzzle, rpg, racing, tower-defense, arena-combat, survival, music-rhythm, custom. Every .raku file must have schema_version '1.0' and a game object with title, genre, and template. See https://rakuai.com/llm-guide.html for generation best practices and https://rakuai.com/templates.html for available templates with sample prompts.
